name: Karma, Channeler
text:
[Vision] (When you play me, look at the top card of your Main Deck. You may recycle it.)
When you recycle one or more cards to your Main Deck, buff a friendly unit. (If it doesn't have a buff, it gets a +1 :rb_might: buff. Runes aren't cards.)
